subject: To be doen later
body:
If you want, I can now:

   - Build the *debug console*
   - Build the *world inspector*
   - Build the *agent inspector*
   - Build the *timeline viewer*
   - Build the *simulation dashboard*
   - Build the *world seed generator*
   - Build the *BEAST API layer*
   - Build the *runtime hooks*
   - Build the *modding layer*

Just say *next* and I’ll take you there.
